one_time_description: Qualified audit opinion due to deferred revenue of $9,968,697 recorded for all unspent funds that may not meet PSAS criteria for deferral
economic_notes: First Nation holds 33.33% interest in Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group Limited Partnership (marine activities and economic development). Also has Dzawada'enuxw Development Corporation. Major Padakus Creek hydro project underway with Hazelwood Construction Services, contract value $12,194,100.
notes: Audit is qualified due to deferred revenue of $9,968,697 (2023: $8,327,040) recorded for all unspent funds without meeting PSAS criteria. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group Limited Partnership (33.33%) and Dzawada'enuxw Development Corporation. Major capital project: Padakus Creek hydro infrastructure, $12,194,100 contract with Hazelwood Construction Services, causing large increase in tangible capital assets from $10M to $20.3M. No long-term debt on balance sheet. BC province confirmed as jurisdiction. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
